metadata.description: MoE-aware coding skill and code-assistant instructions that stabilize expert routing for DeepSeek and other Mixture-of-Experts models

plugins.name: deepseek-moe-coding
plugins.description: Stabilizes MoE expert routing via role anchors, consistent vocabulary, single-domain turns, and structured prompts, then enforces impact-mapping and per-change verification. For DeepSeek, Qwen, GLM, and local MoE models.
